0.title: Welcome to HealthVault
0.description: Your personal health assistant — scan food to check if it's safe for you, chat about nutrition and wellness, and get advice personalized to your conditions, allergies, and goals.

1.title: Private by Design
1.description: We'll ask about your health to give personalized advice, but everything stays on your device. No accounts, no sign-ups, no cloud sync. Your data never leaves your browser.

2.title: Let's Set You Up
2.description: Next, we'll walk you through a quick setup: pick an AI provider (the free Community option works great) and optionally add your health details. Takes about 2 minutes.

onboarding.chooseLanguageDesc: Select the language you'd like to use. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.connectProviderDesc: Choose an AI provider to power food analysis, health queries, and personalised suggestions. Your API key is stored locally and never sent to our servers.
onboarding.aboutYouDesc: Help us personalize your experience. All fields are optional.
onboarding.healthConditionsDesc: Select any existing conditions you manage.
onboarding.healthProfileDesc: Select conditions you manage and any known allergies.
onboarding.bodyMeasurementsDesc: Optional — helps with nutrition and fitness recommendations.
onboarding.allergiesDesc: Select known allergies or add your own.
onboarding.medicationsDesc: List any medications you're currently taking.
onboarding.medsAndDietDesc: List your current medications and dietary preferences.
onboarding.dietaryPreferencesDesc: Select any dietary preferences you follow.
onboarding.healthGoalsDesc: What are you trying to achieve?

dashboard.newFoodScanDesc: Scan ingredients and check if they're safe for you
dashboard.noActivity: No activity yet. Try scanning a food label or asking a health question!

scanner.title: Food Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Enter ingredients, snap a food label, or take a photo of a food item to check if it's safe for you.
scanner.placeholder:
Enter ingredients separated by commas…
e.g. sugar, citric acid, sodium benzoate
scanner.clickUpload: Click to select an image of a food item or ingredients label
scanner.clickCamera: Click to take a photo of a food item or label
scanner.notFoodDesc: Please upload a photo of a food item (e.g. a snack, dish, or beverage) or an ingredients label. We couldn't identify any food in this image.
scanner.imageWarning: ⚠️ Your current provider ({{name}}) doesn't support image analysis. Upload will fall back to basic text extraction (OCR), which may be less accurate.

chat.title: Health Chat
chat.emptyState: Ask any health-related question. Your profile will be used for personalized answers.
chat.newChatTip: 💡 Start a new chat for unrelated questions — keeps answers faster & more accurate.
chat.profileUpdateDetected: Based on your conversation, new health information was detected.

starters.allergyWatch: What ingredients should I watch out for with my {{allergy}} allergy?
starters.dairy: Can I eat dairy with my condition?

settings.title: Settings
settings.promptPreviewDesc: Preview the exact prompt sent to the AI provider
settings.dataPrivacy: Your data never leaves your device unless you choose to send it to an AI provider.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete all local data including profile, conversations, scan history, and settings. This cannot be undone.
settings.clearConfirm: Erase ALL HealthVault data? This cannot be undone.

provider.label: Provider
provider.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Check your credentials and try again.

community.description: The Community provider routes your queries through a private Azure OpenAI resource. Your conversations (including health context) are sent to this service for processing. No data is stored on the server.
community.rateLimit: Rate limit: 10–20 requests per hour per IP

nutrition.title: Nutrition Facts
nutrition.dvFootnote: % Daily Value (DV) based on a 2,000-calorie diet (FDA 2020).
nutrition.source: Nutrient amounts are AI-estimated. %DV calculated from FDA Daily Reference Values (21 CFR 101.36). Not a substitute for actual nutrition labels.
nutrition.uploadHint: Want to see % Daily Value? Upload or photograph the ingredients list / nutrition label for this product.
